Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt (confirmed worn during this scene)
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver vine-leaf pocket watch carried in linen shirt pocket
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Wore formal clothing, a silk hat, and a handkerchief for his visit to the security company.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, and a handkerchief

Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text mentions his gray pupils and that he smokes a pipe with tobacco and mint leaves.
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black coat over a waistcoat with a gold watch chain draped across the chest
Dunn Smith.unique_identifier: black top hat concealing slightly high hairline; deep gray eyes; black trench coat reaching knees; carries a tobacco pipe

The Creator.primary_clothing: none, body composed of land and stars
The Creator.face_description: A cosmic visage where one eye is a burning sun and the other a blood-red moon, framed by the void of space.
The Creator.visual_anchor: Eternal cosmic being, one eye is the sun and the other is the crimson moon, body merging into the land and stars
The Creator.color_palette: golden yellow, crimson red, deep space black, starlight white
The Creator.distinguishing_features: Eyes are celestial bodies; body is the universe itself
The Creator.source_notes: Mentioned in the creation myth; physical description based on the myth's details.

Eternal Blazing Sun.primary_clothing: Radiant golden Victorian robes with sun-burst patterns and white lace
Eternal Blazing Sun.face_description: Perfectly symmetrical features with a glowing complexion and intense, radiating golden eyes.
Eternal Blazing Sun.visual_anchor: Eternal male deity, radiant golden skin and hair, golden eyes, wearing sun-patterned golden Victorian robes
Eternal Blazing Sun.color_palette: bright gold, brilliant white, saffron yellow
Eternal Blazing Sun.faction: Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun
Eternal Blazing Sun.source_notes: Deity mentioned in myth; appearance guessed based on title and name.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

God of Knowledge and Wisdom.primary_clothing: Deep blue scholar's robes with silver trim and numerous scrolls hanging from the belt
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.face_description: Wise, wrinkled face with a high forehead and sharp, discerning eyes behind spectacles.
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.visual_anchor: Elderly male deity, long white hair and beard, deep blue robes, holding an ancient book or scroll
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.distinguishing_features: Radiates an aura of calm intelligence
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.source_notes: Deity mentioned in myth; appearance guessed based on domain.

Earth Mother.primary_clothing: Flowing emerald and brown gown decorated with floral patterns and wheat stalks
Earth Mother.face_description: Warm and maternal face with soft features and eyes the color of a lush forest.
Earth Mother.visual_anchor: Maternal female deity, olive skin, long wavy brown hair with flower crown, wearing emerald green gown
Earth Mother.color_palette: emerald green, earth brown, wheat gold
Earth Mother.distinguishing_features: Appeared during the Third Epoch (Cataclysm Epoch).
Earth Mother.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions appearance in the Third Epoch.

God of Combat.primary_clothing: Heavy gunmetal gray plate armor over dark leather, scarlet cloak
God of Combat.face_description: Rugged, battle-scarred face with a square jaw and fierce, determined eyes.
God of Combat.visual_anchor: Powerful male deity in gunmetal plate armor, scarlet cloak, battle-scarred face with square jaw
God of Combat.color_palette: gunmetal gray, scarlet red, iron black
God of Combat.distinguishing_features: Appeared during the Third Epoch (Cataclysm Epoch).
God of Combat.faction: Church of the God of Combat
God of Combat.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions appearance in the Third Epoch.

God of Steam and Machinery.primary_clothing: Victorian inventor attire with a leather apron over a formal suit
God of Steam and Machinery.face_description: Intelligent, calculating face with precise features and sharp, observant eyes.
God of Steam and Machinery.visual_anchor: ageless male, average build, neat grey hair, amber eyes, wearing a leather apron over a Victorian suit
God of Steam and Machinery.color_palette: brass yellow, steel grey, leather brown, coal black
God of Steam and Machinery.distinguishing_features: Originally known as the God of Craftsmanship; born in the Fourth Epoch.
God of Steam and Machinery.faction: Church of the God of Steam and Machinery
God of Steam and Machinery.source_notes: Text explicitly states original name and epoch of birth.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Awoken at the end of the Second Epoch. Her full title includes Mistress of Repose and Silence.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Text details her awakening and full titles.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: Innermost Ether Body/Astral Projection is deep blue, akin to the sea and a tidal storm (visible to Spirit Vision).
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Aura and Astral Projection details observed by Klein using Spirit Vision.

Archbishop Chanis.primary_clothing: Black high-collared Nighthawk vestments with silver Evernight emblems
Archbishop Chanis.face_description: Thin, ascetic face with deep-set gray eyes and a solemn, authoritative expression.
Archbishop Chanis.visual_anchor: Elderly male cleric, silver hair, deep-set gray eyes, wearing black Nighthawk vestments with silver moon emblems
Archbishop Chanis.accessories: Silver holy emblem of the Evernight Goddess
Archbishop Chanis.source_notes: Text explicitly names him as the founder of the Nighthawks.

Mrs. Moretti.primary_clothing: Modest dark Victorian house dress, simple white apron
Mrs. Moretti.face_description: Gentle, tired face with kind eyes and a faint smile of devotion.
Mrs. Moretti.visual_anchor: Middle-aged female, pale skin, dark brown hair in a bun, wearing a modest dark Victorian dress and white apron
Mrs. Moretti.distinguishing_features: deceased — passed away the year Klein entered Khoy University
Mrs. Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 1 Klein backstory: 'His mother was a devotee of the Evernight Goddess. She passed away the year Klein passed the entrance examinations to Khoy University.'
